raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "report an observational fact about a first clinical encounter and the patient's observed mobility",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker is a clinician or authority figure receiving patients",
    "the child has a pre-existing foot condition requiring mechanical correction",
    "the two contrivances are responsible for the observed walking ability",
    "February 1915 marks the initial presentation of this case to the speaker"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; the causal link between contrivances and walking is clearly asserted and temporally anchored",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement forms part of a verifiable case record, medical history, or biographical timeline and the described contrivances and date can be independently corroborated",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as authoritative evidence while the speaker's expertise, the efficacy of the contrivances, or the accuracy of the date prove false or fabricated"
}
